code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let trimmed = string.trim(s)
  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    print("")
  else
    mut result = ""
    mut current = ""
    mut token = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(trimmed)
    while i <= n
      let b = if i < n
        match string.byte_at(trimmed, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
      else
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          if token == current
            token = ""
          else
            if string.is_empty(result)
              result = token
            else
              result = "#{result} #{token}"
            end
            current = token
            token = ""
          end
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print(result)
  end
when None
  print("")
end
